value.description: Codex reads layered `AGENTS.md` files (global `~/.codex/AGENTS.md`, then repo root, then subdirectories) before starting any task, concatenating them into a single instruction chain. You shape the agent's behavior, conventions, and workflow rules by writing Markdown in these files, with deeper files overriding earlier ones and `AGENTS.override.md` variants available for temporary overrides at any level.
value.label: AGENTS.md
